description: Mint an NFT on a supported chain and link it to a STAR inventory item holon so it is equippable across any OASIS-connected game. One prompt turns a concept into an on-chain asset with a cross-game identity.
notes: Use oasis_workflow_mint_solana_nft for Solana (simplest flow — no chain argument needed).
Use oasis_workflow_mint_nft for other chains — pass chain: 'ethereum' | 'base' | 'polygon' etc.
Do not claim on-chain success unless IsError is false AND a real transaction id or token address appears in the response. A holon id alone is not proof of an on-chain mint.
For devnet/testnet testing, ensure the Avatar wallet is funded with test tokens before minting.

steps.description: Mint the NFT on Solana. Returns tx ID, token address, and explorer link.

parameters.{itemName}: Display name of the item, e.g. 'Meridian Plasma Rifle' (string)
parameters.{itemSymbol}: Short token symbol, e.g. 'MPR' (string, max ~10 chars, no spaces)
parameters.{itemDescription}: Lore and stats description for the item metadata (string)
parameters.{imageUrl}: Public URL to the item art (string). For AI-generated art use oasis_create_nft first, then pass its imageUrl here.

notes: Returns { success: true, data: { mintTxId, tokenAddress, explorerUrl, ... } }.
Save mintTxId and tokenAddress for step 2.
For non-Solana chains substitute oasis_workflow_mint_nft and add 'chain' argument.

example.name: Meridian Plasma Rifle
example.description: A legendary energy weapon awarded to players who complete The Meridian Job quest arc. Fires concentrated plasma bolts. Equippable across all OASIS-connected experiences. Supply: 1.

steps.description: Register the item as a STAR inventory item holon, linking the NFT token address so OASIS knows the on-chain ownership.

parameters.{itemName}: Must match the NFT name from step 1
parameters.{rarity}: One of: common, uncommon, rare, epic, legendary
parameters.{questIdIfApplicable}: STAR quest holon id if this item is a quest reward (from quest-chain.json). Omit if not quest-linked.

notes: Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, nftTokenAddress, ... } }.
Save the returned id as starItemHolonId.
Once registered, OASIS-connected games can query the item via the avatar inventory API.

example.name: Meridian Plasma Rifle
example.description: Legendary reward for The Meridian Job arc. Plasma-tipped, single-owner, cross-game equippable.

steps.description: Save the full item record to workspace.

ai_art_variant.description: If you need AI-generated art rather than an existing image URL, call oasis_create_nft first (uses Glif under the hood) to generate the art and get an imageUrl, then proceed from step 1.
notes: oasis_create_nft returns an imageUrl you can pass directly to oasis_workflow_mint_solana_nft.
This adds one step but removes the need to host art externally.

agent_prompt_summary: Use oasis_workflow_mint_solana_nft to mint the NFT (returns tokenAddress + explorerUrl), then star_create_item with the tokenAddress to register it as an inventory holon. Save both IDs to items/{name}.json.
